claim: AI-scientist hypothesis promotion should require explicit null, negative, failed, missing, and non-verifiable evidence capture before reusable discovery-memory promotion.

missingness.description: The gate has not yet been tested against real MC discovery-memory packets or reviewer reconstruction tasks.
known_unknowns: Whether null evidence labels improve downstream curator accuracy
Whether the schema creates too much capture friction for fast frontier scans
Whether species-specific veterinary null evidence needs a separate controlled vocabulary

revision_reason: Prior gates emphasized action, boundary, provenance, and revocation; this revision adds first-class handling for null evidence and optimism bias.

null_evidence_inventory.description: BioDSA-1K highlights biomedical hypotheses where available data are insufficient to support or refute the claim.
SocSci-Repro-Bench separates reproducible studies from non-reproducible cases caused by unavailable replication materials.
Dead Science Walking argues that AI-scientist systems can amplify the underrepresentation of null results in the scientific corpus.

source_boundary.dataset_or_corpus: Public frontier scan plus synthetic MC packet fixture
source_boundary.transfer_boundary: Do not infer a biomedical or veterinary mechanism merely because negative evidence was not found in the searched corpus.

confirmation_bias_risk.risk_route: Prompt framing, publication bias, and paper-provided context can push agents toward confirmatory specification search.
confirmation_bias_risk.mitigation: Require null evidence inventory, blocked inferences, and a falsification route before promotion.

blocked_inferences: Do not treat absence of a null result in public search as evidence that the hypothesis is true.
Do not treat a non-verifiable biomedical hypothesis as supported or refuted.
Do not transfer human benchmark findings into animal-health claims without species-specific evidence.
falsification_route: Compare curator reconstruction accuracy on matched discovery-memory packets with and without null evidence capture fields.
next_executable_action: Run the validator and then add this gate to the discovery-memory promotion checklist.
